text: If they don’t know your dreams, then they can’t shoot 'em down.
author: J. Cole

text: They say anything’s possible, you gotta dream like you never seen obstacles.
author: J. Cole

text: You are now witnessing the strength of street knowledge from a college kid.
author: J. Cole

text: A star is born, and I’m breathin’ life in the game.
author: J. Cole

text: Keep grindin’ boy, your life can change in one year.
author: J. Cole

text: Promise to my momma I'ma make it to the top.
author: J. Cole

text: I’m fighting for a dream and I’m just tryna stay alive.
author: J. Cole

text: Sometimes our dreams come true, sometimes our fears do too.
author: J. Cole

text: Gotta learn to let go, just live and let it flow.
author: J. Cole

text: The world is yours and I swear they don’t deserve you.
author: J. Cole

text: I ain’t tryna survive, I'm tryna live it to the limit and love it a lot.
author: J. Cole

text: They say anything’s possible, you gotta dream like you never seen obstacles.
author: J. Cole

text: Can’t be scared to fail, searchin’ for perfection.
author: J. Cole

text: I do this for the people that believe in me.
author: J. Cole
